title: Summarize BATS datasets
description: Overview of BATS-related datasets in CMAP (coverage, key variables, and usage notes).
prompt: Can you summarize the BATS (Bermuda Atlantic Time-series Study) datasets available in CMAP? Please include: (1) what each dataset contains, (2) temporal/spatial coverage, (3) key variables, and (4) any notes on units and quality flags.

title: Find nutrient datasets for a region
description: Recommend CMAP datasets with nutrient variables (nitrate/phosphate/silicate) for a specified lat/lon box.
prompt: I'm looking for nutrient datasets that cover this region: lat1=-35, lat2=-25, lon1=-179, lon2=-175. What CMAP datasets would you recommend, and what nutrient variables do they provide (e.g., nitrate, phosphate, silicate)?

title: List datasets contributed by the Armbrust group
description: Find datasets by contributor/lab and provide a short, readable list.
prompt: What CMAP datasets have been contributed by the Armbrust group? Please list dataset names/titles and a one-line description for each.

title: Download a nitrate subset (Darwin climatology, December)
description: Extract a small 4D subset and return a downloadable file + a quick summary.
prompt: Return a subset of nitrate from the Darwin climatology model dataset (tblDarwin_Nutrient_Climatology) for December over this region: lat1=25, lat2=35, lon1=-179, lon2=-175, depth1=0, depth2=5 m. Please return the data as a downloadable file and summarize the number of rows and variables.

title: Global map of cloud base height (Dec 1945)
description: Create a visualization and return it as an image.
prompt: Make a global map of cloud base height for December 1945. Use an appropriate dataset available in CMAP and return the plot as an image.

title: Global map of satellite SST (May 9, 2023)
description: Create a global SST map for a specific date and return the image.
prompt: Can you make a global map of satellite SST (sst in tblSST_AVHRR_OI_NRT) on May 9, 2023 using Robinson projection?

title: Regional SST time series (Jun-Jul 2020)
description: Compute and plot a time series averaged over a region; return an image (and optionally the data).
prompt: Make a time series plot of satellite SST (sst in tblSST_AVHRR_OI_NRT) within a region (lat1=20, lat2=22, lon1=-179, lon2=-176) from June 1 2020 to July 15 2020.

title: Colocalize a cruise expedition dataset with atmospheric data, satellite SST, and Nitrate climatology
description: Join an in-situ dataset to gridded products by time/lat/lon; return a merged table or download link.
prompt:
Can you colocalize the 'Discrete Flow Cytometry of Underway Samples from TN427 Using a BD Influx Cell Sorter' dataset with: 
total precipitation (tp in tblERA5_monthly_averaged_single_level) from ERA5 dataset, 
and daily satellite SST (sst in tblSST_AVHRR_OI_NRT), 
and Nitrate monthly climatology from the World Ocean Atlas 2013 v2 Climatology dataset (nitrate_WOA_clim in tblWOA_Climatology)?

title: Colocalize in-situ data with satellite Chlorophyll
description: Join an in-situ dataset to a gridded product by time/lat/lon; return a merged table or download link.
prompt:
Can you colocalize the 'C-MORE BiG-RAPA MV1015 Downcast Bottle Data' dataset with: 
satellite chl (chlor_a in tblModis_CHL_cl1)?

title: (Takes Several Minutes!) Integrate BIOS-SCOPE survey dataset with atmospheric data, satellite SST, and Phosphate Darwin climatology
description: Join an in-situ dataset to gridded products by time/lat/lon; return a merged table or download link.
prompt:
Can you integrate the 'BIOS-SCOPE Biogeochemical Survey' dataset with: 
daily satellite SST data (sst in tblSST_AVHRR_OI_NRT), 
Phosphate climatology from Darwin model (PO4_darwin_clim in tblDarwin_Nutrient_Climatology), 
and total precipitation from ERA5 dataset (tp in tblERA5_monthly_averaged_single_level)?
